rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Carl about the gate.

rows.name: Discuss

rows.name: Ask Carl if anything is troubling him.

Ask Carl how to switch
between night and day.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Carl for his thoughts
on your mission results.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Carl if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Carl how to switch
between night and day.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0071
rows.name:
Ask Carl for his thoughts
on your mission results.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Carl how to best get around NLA.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Carl about the terrain of Mira.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0101
rows.name:
Ask Carl about his
thoughts on the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0111
rows.name:
Ask Carl about his thoughts on the
Doll you found in Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask Carl about his thoughts on Goetia.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask Carl how he fared during the attack.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Carl about any recent developments.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL1021
rows.name:
Ask Carl about his
thoughts on the Larsians.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Carl about his thoughts on
your battle with the Zu Pharg.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL1041
rows.name:
Ask Carl for his thoughts
on Lao's betrayal.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL1051
rows.name:
Ask Carl about the battle
for the Central Life.

rows.label: tev010401_SEL1061
rows.name:
Ask Carl about the battle
for the Central Life.

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0001
rows.name:
That gate over there? The east one? Can
you believe how long it's been sealed?
This is really getting to be a hassle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Huh? You want to know why people
can pass through the west gate,
but not this east one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, NLA is just the residential unit of a ship
that's been hastily reconstructed into a city. It
wasn't exactly built with ease of access in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0004
rows.name:
The west gate entrance is where the
passage to the White Whale's
maintenance-management area used to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm surprised you didn't know that. Everybody
kno—oh! Are you that newly discovered crew member?
You are, aren't you? Hey, welcome to NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Man, I'm as excited about my next
mission as I am my next root canal.
You wanna swap? ...Just kidding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0007
rows.name:
I mean, I'd love to swap, but if
Trevor found out that I passed a
mission off, he'd tear me a new one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Trevor's as strict as they come,
and no mistake. You don't ever
wanna get on his bad side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Seriously? You just got here and
they're already sending you out on
data-probe installation? Daaay-um![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0010
rows.name:
You want my advice? Travel by
day, and only by day. It's a
hell of a lot safer that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0011
rows.name:
When it gets dark, crawl into a
free tent or trailer at a base
camp and sleep until sunrise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you go walking around at night
and get lost, you'll probably never
see another sunrise again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0013
rows.name:
So let me get this straight. You safely installed
a data probe on your very first mission, AND
killed an Overed while you were at it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0014
rows.name: Holy crap, [ST:gender p1=dude p2=lady ]. You do NOT mess around![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Man, I'm really gonna enjoy having
you around. 'Cause I sure as hell
don't wanna do this stuff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Man, I'm so sick of Trevor pushing
us around. He made me do an
indigen bounty mission solo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Now he's sending me on a super-hard
mission in some area we've barely
got any FrontierNet info about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0018
rows.name:
It sure would be great if someone went and
planted a data probe in Primordial Wilderness
for me, you know? Yep. Suuuuure would be great.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Like, that new kid everyone's talking about? The
one installing data probes all over the place? It
would be great if [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] did that. I'm just saying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0020
rows.name:
I just heard that you were taking over for
Nelson's team on that search mission. You
gotta be careful out there, man. Seriously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I know you've heard it before, but it's all
the more important that you travel during the
day when you're exploring uncharted lands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0022
rows.name:
When it gets too dark to find
your way, just rest up in a tent
or trailer at a base camp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Base camps are awesome, man. They make good landmarks,
plus you can catch forty winks without looking over
your shoulder the whole time. I love 'em.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0024
rows.name:
No way. There's just... I mean, no
WAY! Did you seriously take down that
Bias fortress? Like, seriously?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Man, I can't believe how much you've
done. And you just got here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ah, I shouldn't keep you. You
have a report to file. Hurry
over to the Home[ST:gender p1=, man! p2=! ] Go go go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0027
rows.name:
You're probably the first BLADE to ever live up
to Vandham's expectations. ...Or maybe everyone
does, and it's just me that disappoints him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Whoa, your next mission's
in Nightglow Forest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0029
rows.name:
If that's the case, you probably want to
go out through the west gate in the
industrial district. That'll be quicker.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0030
rows.name:
You can get to the industrial district in a
blink of an eye if you take the transport in
front of BLADE Tower. It's a big time-saver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0031
rows.name:
If you go northeast from NLA,
and then east some more, the
terrain turns into a wasteland.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Mira's a really messed-up place. All
of a sudden, bam! You're in a wasteland!
Or, bam! You're in a forest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0033
rows.name:
It just doesn't have the middle ground that
Earth does. Those sorts of transitions were
always really gradual on Earth, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0034
rows.name:
Makes you wonder how exactly the
continents of Mira were formed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0035
rows.name:
All of a sudden there's this massive ship overhead,
and all these smiling Ma-non are like, "Hi, I guess?"
I was like, damn! Now I've really seen everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Now they're just wandering around the city, chatting
with folks, offering to upgrade machines, and
eating all the pizza that isn't bolted down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0037
rows.name:
It's like the city's sprung to life all of a sudden.
I mean, it was awfully quiet without any kids around,
so it's kinda fun having the Ma-non here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Of course, we'd make friends
with any xenoforms YOU rescue,
no matter what they're like![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0039
rows.name:
They were carrying in some Doll-like thing
earlier. Being real careful with it, too.
You're the one who found that, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0040
rows.name:
That's pretty incredible, finding
something like that and bringing
it back to the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0041
rows.name:
So are they gonna use that to develop
new models of Dolls or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0042
rows.name:
I guess it doesn't really matter to
me. I'd never get to pilot 'em,
'cause I don't even have a license.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0043
rows.name:
I wonder how that squid lady
knows so much about us humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Maybe the Growth interrogated a captured
BLADE? Or they were able to pull the info
out of someone's wrecked Blue Blood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0045
rows.name:
Well, whatever the story, I ain't about to
criticize. If the Growth threatened to torture
me, I'd spill everything I knew in two seconds flat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0046
rows.name:
As an Interceptor, it's my duty to
risk my life in the defense of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0047
rows.name:
I mean, that's the way it's SUPPOSED to be, but I ain't
gonna lie to you, man—at the first sign of trouble, I
ran crying to the restricted hangar's engine room.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0048
rows.name:
When the enemy busted in after me, I thought
I was a dead man. But they just stole that
Doll back and went on their merry way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0049
rows.name:
I thought it'd be safe down there, but it's
like we just stopped defending the hangar
right in the middle of the invasion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0050
rows.name:
Of COURSE it's gonna get stolen if we're all
half-assed about it! When we have something important
in there, we really gotta tighten up our guard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0051
rows.name:
Ah, hell. Maybe I shoulda done something. I'm
sorry, man. If it makes you feel any better,
I already had Trevor tear me a new one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0072
rows.name:
Thanks to you helping me out,
Trevor actually had something
nice to say to me for once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0073
rows.name:
But man, it still bothers me. Even
if they're indigens, I don't wanna
kill a mom with her kid, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0074
rows.name:
I guess I'm just not cut
out to be an Interceptor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0075
rows.name:
Man, I wish I could be like
you, just cutting through
everything that gets in my way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0076
rows.name:
I read the reports about your fight
with those Larsians! They seemed like
surprisingly decent guys, actually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0077
rows.name:
They're less scary than a lot of
the other xenoforms out there, though
I know looks can be deceiving.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0078
rows.name:
I even heard that Nopon you
hang around with calling them
the "kitty-cat people."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0079
rows.name:
I think they look more like
lions, but what do I know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0080
rows.name:
Oh, man, we owe you big.
Seriously. Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0081
rows.name:
When I think about what would
have happened if that massive
mech had made it to NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0082
rows.name:
Woof! It would have made that previous
attack on the city look like recess![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0083
rows.name: You're seriously my [ST:gender p1=hero p2=heroine ]. No, you're OUR [ST:gender p1=hero p2=heroine ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0084
rows.name:
Back when NLA was attacked, it was Lao who
was guarding the restricted hangar, right?
And he just stopped fighting mid-invasion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0085
rows.name:
I guess that was intentional, huh? I
mean, I've heard the rumors about him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0086
rows.name:
Still, I feel like they could
have chosen someone better
than me to pilot the thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0087
rows.name:
Trevor told me that thinking about
things like that won't do me any good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0088
rows.name:
But I just can't get out of this
rut, you know? Man, I'm pathetic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0089
rows.name:
Man, I've been letting you do the hard work
all this time, while I muddle through just
enough missions to get Trevor off my back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0090
rows.name:
But now I see now how wrong that is! I mean,
maybe I'll never be a great hero like you, but
I'm gonna stop shirking and start fighting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0091
rows.name:
Once I get my gear together, I'm off to the
Lifepoint Core. I'll see you there, man! You're
going to witness Carl fighting the good fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0092
rows.name:
Well? Did you see me
fighting the good fight?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0093
rows.name:
...Where was I? What kinda question
is that?! I was working my butt
off supporting you guys![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0094
rows.name:
Ah, that's fine. What's important
is that the Lifepoint Core is safe
and you made it back in one piece.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0095
rows.name:
Hey, so when do you think they're gonna
let us go back to our old bodies? I can't
wait to squeeze into that thing again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0096
rows.name:
Hey, thanks a lot for your help
with that whole suid piglet thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0097
rows.name:
I heard that afterward, a way
bigger suid came to the place
where the piglets were.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0098
rows.name:
You think that was maybe one of their
parents? Like, those suids were just
waiting for their mama the whole time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0099
rows.name:
Isn't that incredible? We did good!
Preserving the animals and stuff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0100
rows.name:
Trevor yelled at me and called me
a softhearted hippie, but I still
know we did the right thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010401_MSG0101
rows.name:
I mean, I know it looked that way,
but we saved those little piglets'
lives. I feel totally vindicated.[ST:wait ]
